== Notes for [[Item:Q89206|Q89206]] ==

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ishme-Dagan_II

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Assyrian_kings#Adaside_dynasty_(1700%E2%80%93722_BC)

https://id.wikipedia.org/wiki/Isme-Dagan_II

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
66F2940EE5EA31EFBBE49822EF79916CA77A
geni:6000000008222190578

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
